creator: jmrobins@ruin.org
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	/usr/ports/net/jmirror
#	/usr/ports/net/jmirror/Makefile
#	/usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg
#	/usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg/COMMENT
#	/usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg/PLIST
#	/usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg/DESCR
#	/usr/ports/net/jmirror/files
#	/usr/ports/net/jmirror/files/md5
#
echo c - /usr/ports/net/jmirror
mkdir -p /usr/ports/net/jmirror > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/net/jmirror/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/jmirror/Makefile << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/jmirror/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	jmirror
X# Version required:	1.0b
X# Date Created:		4 Febuary 1999
X# Whom:			Justin Robinson
X#
X# $Id$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=	jmirror-1.0b
XCATEGORIES=	net
XMASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.ruin.org/pub/All/
X
XMAINTAINER=	jmrobins@jmirror.ruin.org
X
XRUN_DEPENDS=	${PREFIX}/bin/perl:${PORTSDIR}/lang/perl5 \
X		${PREFIX}/lib/perl5/site_perl/Net/FTP.pm:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-Net
X
XNO_BUILD=       YES
X
Xdo-install:
X	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/lib/jmirror
X	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/jmirror ${PREFIX}/bin/jmirror
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/sample.jmirror.conf ${PREFIX}/lib/jmirror/sample.jmirror.conf
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-/usr/ports/net/jmirror/Makefile
echo c - /usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg
mkdir -p /usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg/COMMENT'
XFTP mirroring program written in PERL (REQUIRES PERL5,Net::FTP).
END-of-/usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - /usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg/PLIST'
Xbin/jmirror
Xlib/jmirror/sample.jmirror.conf
X@dirrm lib/jmirror
END-of-/usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg/PLIST
echo x - /usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg/DESCR'
XThe program 'jmirror' is designed to mirror an entire FTP site
Xor directory.  This is REALLY useful for people who use an ftp
Xclient that cannot download recursively.  This requires both
XPERL 5 (/usr/ports/lang/perl5/), and the CPAN module Net:FTP 
X(http://www.perl.org/CPAN/).
X
X
Xhttp://jmirror.ruin.org/
X
X- Justin Robinson
Xjmrobins@jmirror.ruin.org
END-of-/usr/ports/net/jmirror/pkg/DESCR
echo c - /usr/ports/net/jmirror/files
mkdir -p /usr/ports/net/jmirror/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/net/jmirror/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/jmirror/files/md5 << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/jmirror/files/md5'
XMD5 (jmirror-1.0b.tar.gz) = f42e049bff86641eebfbc84e848bfabf
END-of-/usr/ports/net/jmirror/files/md5
exit
